VariablesInvalidDataGenericError.description: Generic invalid data response with standard error structure. Includes code INVALID_DATA and validation details.
VariablesInvalidDataGenericError.title: Variables Invalid Data Generic Error

VariablesRequiredFieldMissingError.description: Error returned when the required variables field is not provided. Includes code MANDATORY_NOT_FOUND and validation details.
VariablesRequiredFieldMissingError.title: Variables Required Field Missing Error

VariablesScopedRemovalResponse.description: Success response summarizing outcomes of variable removal within a scoped context, with per-item results.
VariablesScopedRemovalResponse.title: Variables Removal Response (Scoped)

VariablesBatchUpdateResponse.description: Success response summarizing the outcome of a batch update, with an array of per-item operation results.
VariablesBatchUpdateResponse.title: Variables Batch Update Response

allOf.description: Required fields for variable_group in PUT

GeneratedSchema2.description: Operation-specific schema for variable_group in PUT
GeneratedSchema2.title: Generated Schema

VariablesBatchOperationMultiStatus.description: Batch response indicating mixed successes and failures. Contains a variables array with per-item outcomes and related details.
VariablesBatchOperationMultiStatus.title: Variables Batch Operation (Multi-Status)

VariableListItem.description: Representation of a variable within collection responses, including readOnly, apiName, name, description, id, source, type, value, and group brief.
VariableListItem.title: Variable List Item

VariablesBatchUpdateRequestAlt1.description: Alternate instance of the batch update request wrapper holding an array of variable update items.

variables.description: this provides josnarray of update variables (Required)

VariablesBatchUpdateRequestAlt1.title: Variables Batch Update Request (Alternate 1)

VariableGroupInvalidIDError.description: Indicates an invalid variable group identifier in the request path. Includes code INVALID_DATA and validation details.
VariableGroupInvalidIDError.title: Variable Group Invalid ID Error

InvalidResourceIdError.description: Indicates an invalid identifier in the request URL. Includes code INVALID_DATA and contextual details.
InvalidResourceIdError.title: Invalid Resource ID Error

VariableOperationResult.description: Per-item outcome for a variable operation, including code, message, status, and details such as the resulting variable id.
VariableOperationResult.title: Variable Operation Result

InvalidUrlPatternError.description: Returned when the requested URL does not match a supported pattern. Includes code INVALID_URL_PATTERN.

enum: Please check if the URL trying to access is a correct one

InvalidUrlPatternError.title: Invalid URL Pattern Error

InvalidRequestMethodError.description: Returned when an unsupported HTTP request method is used. Includes code INVALID_REQUEST_METHOD.

enum: The http request method type is not a valid one

InvalidRequestMethodError.title: Invalid Request Method Error

VariablesInvalidTypeError.description: Indicates an invalid data type for the variables field. Includes code INVALID_DATA and validation details.

enum: Please check whether the input values are correct

VariablesInvalidTypeError.title: Variables Invalid Type Error

VariableGroupInvalidReferenceError.description: Error payload returned when the supplied variable group identifier (id or rid) is invalid during variable processing.

enum: the id given seems to be invalid

VariableGroupInvalidReferenceError.title: Variable Group Invalid Reference Error

VariablesDuplicateDataError.description: Indicates that submitted data duplicates existing records. Includes code DUPLICATE_DATA, details, message, and status.
VariablesDuplicateDataError.title: Variables Duplicate Data Error

VariablesInvalidDataGeneralError.description: Another form of invalid data error with validation details. Includes code INVALID_DATA and message.
VariablesInvalidDataGeneralError.title: Variables Invalid Data General Error

VariableResultDetails.description: Details of an individual variable operation result, including the id of the affected variable.
VariableResultDetails.title: Variable Result Details

VariableCreationItem.description: Represents a variable to create, including api_name, name, optional description, data type (text, integer, boolean, date, float), initial value, and the target variable_group reference.

api_name.description: this shows the api name of the variables (Required)

name.description: It shows name of the variables (Required)

VariableCreationItem.title: Variable Creation Item

VariablesbyGroupResponse.description: Collection wrapper returning variables associated with the specified group identifier.
VariablesbyGroupResponse.title: Variables by Group Response

VariablesRemovalFailedError.description: Indicates failure to remove a variable due to an invalid ID or other issues. Includes code INVALID_DATA and validation details.
VariablesRemovalFailedError.title: Variables Removal Failed Error

VariableGroupBrief.description: Brief reference to a variable group included in list responses, containing id and apiName.
VariableGroupBrief.title: Variable Group Brief

VariableGroupQueryAmbiguityError.description: Error payload for ambiguous query parameters where group and group_rid are both supplied or conflict.
VariableGroupQueryAmbiguityError.title: Variable Group Query Ambiguity Error

ScopedVariableUpdateItem.description: Object used to update a variable's value within a scoped resource context; accepts id or rid and the new value.
ScopedVariableUpdateItem.title: Scoped Variable Update Item

VariableValueInvalidDataError.description: Indicates invalid data supplied for a variable's value during update. Includes code INVALID_DATA and validation details.

enum: Please check whether the input values are correct

VariableValueInvalidDataError.title: Variable Value Invalid Data Error

VariablesInvalidDataTypeError.description: General invalid data type error with validation details. Includes code INVALID_DATA and a descriptive message.
VariablesInvalidDataTypeError.title: Variables Invalid Data Type Error

VariablesRequestBodyMissingError.description: Error returned when the request body is missing. Includes code INVALID_DATA, validation details, message, and error status.
VariablesRequestBodyMissingError.title: Variables Request Body Missing Error

VariableGroupSummary.description: Compact representation of a variable group in read responses, including id and apiName.
VariableGroupSummary.title: Variable Group Summary

VariableGroupAmbiguityError.description: Error payload indicating ambiguity while processing variable group identifiers, such as conflicting id and rid references.
VariableGroupAmbiguityError.title: Variable Group Ambiguity Error

VariablesBatchOperationCreated.description: Summary response for a batch variables operation where all items are created successfully. Includes an array of per-item results.
VariablesBatchOperationCreated.title: Variables Batch Operation (Created)

VariableResource.description: Full read model for a variable, including apiName, name, description, id, source, type, value, and its variable group summary.
VariableResource.title: Variable Resource

VariablesDuplicateDataExtendedError.description: Duplicate data error with extended validation details. Includes code DUPLICATE_DATA, detailed context, message, and status.
VariablesDuplicateDataExtendedError.title: Variables Duplicate Data Extended Error

VariablesDomainNotSupportedError.description: Returned when the operation is not supported for the selected domain. Includes code INVALID_DATA and validation details.
VariablesDomainNotSupportedError.title: Variables Domain Not Supported Error

VariablesInvalidDataError.description: Generic invalid data error for the submitted payload. Includes code INVALID_DATA, details, message, and status.
VariablesInvalidDataError.title: Variables Invalid Data Error

VariablesListResponse.description: Response wrapper containing an array of variables returned by the list operation.
VariablesListResponse.title: Variables List Response

VariableRidInvalidParameterError.description: Error payload returned when the rid parameter is invalid for deletion of variables.

enum: the rid given seems to be invalid

VariableRidInvalidParameterError.title: Variable rid Invalid Parameter Error

VariablesBatchInput.description: Request body wrapper that carries an array of variable definitions to be processed in a single batch.
VariablesBatchInput.title: Variables Batch Input

VariableGroupIdentifierInput.description: Nested object that identifies the variable group when defining a variable. Includes the group's id (required) and rid (UUID) if available.
VariableGroupIdentifierInput.title: Variable Group Identifier

VariablesMandatoryFieldMissingError.description: Error for a missing required field in the payload. Includes code MANDATORY_NOT_FOUND and validation details.
VariablesMandatoryFieldMissingError.title: Variables Mandatory Field Missing Error

VariablesScopedBatchUpdateRequestAlt1.description: Alternate instance of the scoped batch update request wrapper for variable updates.
VariablesScopedBatchUpdateRequestAlt1.title: Variables Batch Update Request (Scoped Alternate 1)

VariablesScopedBatchUpdateResponse.description: Success response summarizing scoped batch updates with an array of per-item operation results.
VariablesScopedBatchUpdateResponse.title: Variables Batch Update Response (Scoped)

VariablesBatchRemovalMultiStatusResponse.description: Batch removal response indicating mixed outcomes for multiple variables, with per-item result details.
VariablesBatchRemovalMultiStatusResponse.title: Variables Batch Removal Multi-Status Response

VariablesPermissionDeniedError.description: Returned when the caller lacks permission to access variables. Includes code NO_PERMISSION and validation details.
VariablesPermissionDeniedError.title: Variables Permission Denied Error

VariableGroupInvalidRidQueryError.description: Error payload returned when the provided group_rid query parameter is invalid.

enum: Please check whether the input values are correct

VariableGroupInvalidRidQueryError.title: Variable Group Invalid rid Parameter Error

ParamQueryGroup.description: Field to filter variables from variable groups id

ParamQueryGroupRid.description: Field to filter variables from variable groups rid
